description: Default scoring weights for multi-criteria site assessment. Weights sum to 1.0. Adjust per project context.

floodRisk.description: Flood risk index (0-1, inverted: lower is better)

landAvailability.description: Proportion of suitable land cover types in zone

gridProximity.description: Night light intensity as proxy for grid infrastructure (higher = closer to grid)

socialVulnerability.description: Poverty rate — higher values prioritized for equity (higher = more need)

siteMatch.description: How well the technology fits the site characteristics

costEffectiveness.description: LCOE range relative to local electricity tariff

implementationReadiness.description: Regulatory framework, supply chain, local expertise

impactPotential.description: Emissions reduction, beneficiary reach, resilience contribution

riskProfile.description: Technical, regulatory, and financial risk assessment
